transcript: Speaker A (AI): तुम क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?] Speaker B (Human): I beling the roti. Speaker A (AI): Haha, beling the roti नहीं, इसे बोलेंगे I am rolling out the roti. [Haha, not beling the roti, we will say I am rolling out the roti.] Speaker B (Human): मुझे भी इंग्लिश सीखनी है, कैसे सीखूं? [I also want to learn English, how do I learn?] Speaker A (AI): बस MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो और रोज़ मेरे साथ 15 मिनट्स इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करो। बस कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश अच्छी हो जाएगी। [Just install MySivi app and practice English with me for 15 minutes daily. In just a few days, your English will get better.] Speaker B (Human): पर ये ऐप तो महंगा होगा ना? [But this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): बिल्कुल नहीं, तुम सिर्फ ₹1 में शुरू कर सकते हो। [Not at all, you can start for just ₹1.] Speaker B (Human): वाह! फिर कैसे स्टार्ट करूं? [Wow! Then how do I start?] Speaker A (AI): बस इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो और अपनी इंग्लिश जर्नी शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, install MySivi app and start your English journey.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Tum kya kar rahe, I beling the roti, Haha, beling the roti, nahi ise bolenge, I am rolling out, the roti Mujhe, MySivi, Par ye app to mehenga, Bilkul nahi, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, phir kaise start, Install, MySivi AI English Speakin..., english journey, MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's literal translation of rolling dough, introducing the MySivi app as an easy way to practice English daily. The ad highlights a promotional offer of premium access for just ₹1 and ends with a call to install the app.
